name: review-with-doc
description: Review a proposed code change or diff against existing design documentation, ADRs, and guidelines. ACTIVATE this skill when reviewing code changes, pull requests, or verifying if changes align with documentation.
custom_notes: When you need to ask a question or clarify details, prefer using the native `ask_question` tool. Frame the question clearly with structured, selectable options, and only fall back to regular text questions if the native tool is not suitable or available.
